title: Add extraction result models
description: Add backend models for profile extraction source metadata, evidence, uncertain items, profile drafts, job status, timestamps, and errors. Align status values with queued/running/completed/failed/needs_review semantics from specs.
acceptance_criteria: Extraction records can represent document or natural-language source metadata, profile_draft, uncertain_items with field/message/suggestion, evidence, and readable errors.
review_initial_requirements: agent-rule-extraction: Structured Agent extraction result; profile-draft-confirmation: Extraction result retrieval
review_regression_requirements: Existing FileRecord, JobRecord, and FormatProfile serialization remain compatible.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 2 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 40 passed 1 warning; added extraction status/source/evidence/uncertain/profile record models

title: Persist extraction jobs in JSON repository
description: Extend JsonMetadataRepository with create/update/get/list helpers for profile extraction jobs and default missing metadata collections to empty lists.
acceptance_criteria: Extraction jobs persist across repository reloads; metadata files without extraction records still load.
review_initial_requirements: rule-source-input: Extraction source traceability; profile-draft-confirmation: Extraction result retrieval
review_regression_requirements: Existing file/job/profile repository tests continue passing.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 4 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 42 passed 1 warning; repository persists profile_extractions and defaults legacy metadata to empty list

title: Test extraction persistence and failed result serialization
description: Add focused tests for extraction job creation, persistence, default empty collection behavior, failed status, and error serialization.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover created/updated timestamps, status changes, failed error messages, and reloading from disk.
review_initial_requirements: profile-draft-confirmation: Retrieve failed extraction result
review_regression_requirements: No regressions in existing metadata tests.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 5 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 43 passed 1 warning; added completed draft reload and failed/update serialization coverage

title: Validate extraction rule sources
description: Implement validation for document-source extraction and natural-language-source extraction, rejecting empty requests, missing files, and unsupported file extensions with readable diagnostics.
acceptance_criteria: Natural-language jobs do not require a file. Document jobs require existing .doc/.docx file ids. Empty source requests fail clearly.
review_initial_requirements: rule-source-input: Rule document extraction source; Natural-language extraction source
review_regression_requirements: Existing file upload validation remains unchanged.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 9 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 47 passed 1 warning; added source validation for natural_language, .doc/.docx file ids, empty source, missing file, unsupported file

title: Extract rule document text
description: Add rule document text extraction for .docx and .doc sources. Reuse LibreOffice conversion for .doc and python-docx parsing for text extraction.
acceptance_criteria: .docx source text is extracted. .doc source uses SOFFICE_BIN conversion. Conversion or parse failures surface readable errors.
review_initial_requirements: rule-source-input: Convert DOC source before extraction; Reject unsupported rule source file
review_regression_requirements: Existing document formatting conversion/parser tests continue passing.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 11 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 49 passed 1 warning; added DOCX text extraction and DOC conversion diagnostic wrapping for rule sources

title: Test rule source processing
description: Add tests for natural-language source creation, missing file rejection, unsupported file rejection, .doc conversion diagnostics, and .docx text extraction.
acceptance_criteria: All source-processing scenarios from rule-source-input specs are covered by backend tests.
review_initial_requirements: rule-source-input requirements and scenarios
review_regression_requirements: Existing upload, profile, and document tests still pass.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 12 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 50 passed 1 warning; source-processing tests cover natural language, missing/unsupported files, DOCX extraction, DOC conversion diagnostics, and conversion call path

title: Add bounded LLM provider interface
description: Introduce a narrow provider interface for rule extraction that reads LLM_API_KEY and LLM_MODEL from settings and supports deterministic fake providers in tests.
acceptance_criteria: Missing LLM config produces a readable configuration error; tests can inject a fake provider without network calls.
review_initial_requirements: agent-rule-extraction: LLM configuration and output safety
review_regression_requirements: No hardcoded API keys or model names; health config behavior remains valid.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 14 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 52 passed 1 warning; rg secret scan -> no matches; provider reads settings and fake provider can be injected

title: Parse and validate Agent extraction output
description: Implement strict parsing and validation for Agent output sections: profile_draft, uncertain_items, and evidence. Validate profile_draft using existing FormatProfile schema.
acceptance_criteria: Valid output becomes reviewable; invalid JSON/YAML, missing sections, invalid enum values, unknown critical fields, and missing evidence produce diagnostic errors.
review_initial_requirements: agent-rule-extraction: Structured Agent extraction result; Profile schema validation
review_regression_requirements: Existing Profile schema validation behavior is unchanged.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 18 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 56 passed 1 warning; Agent output parser validates JSON/YAML, profile_draft schema, uncertain_items, and evidence

title: Orchestrate extraction jobs
description: Implement extraction service lifecycle that validates source, calls provider, parses output, stores profile_draft/evidence/uncertain_items, and marks completed/failed/needs_review with readable diagnostics.
acceptance_criteria: Completed jobs expose reviewable drafts. Failed jobs expose source/config/output/schema errors. No profile is automatically created.
review_initial_requirements: agent-rule-extraction requirements; profile-draft-confirmation retrieval scenarios
review_regression_requirements: Manual profile management and document formatting jobs remain usable.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 20 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 58 passed 1 warning; service creates queued extraction jobs, processes provider output, stores completed drafts, and records failures without creating profiles

title: Add Agent schema and safety tests
description: Add tests for valid output, invalid JSON/YAML, missing evidence, unknown fields, invalid enums, missing LLM configuration, and no automatic profile creation.
acceptance_criteria: Agent output safety scenarios are covered without live LLM network calls.
review_initial_requirements: agent-rule-extraction: Profile schema validation; LLM configuration and output safety
review_regression_requirements: No tests require real API keys.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 23 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 61 passed 1 warning; schema tests cover valid JSON/YAML, invalid JSON, missing sections/evidence, unknown fields, invalid enums, missing LLM config, and no auto profile creation

title: Add ECNU sample extraction coverage
description: Add deterministic ECNU extraction coverage using the local formatting requirement sample or extracted fixture text to confirm required profile draft fields and uncertain item handling.
acceptance_criteria: ECNU extraction coverage confirms A4, margins, body indent, 1.5 line spacing, Times New Roman, abstract length, SimSun body, SimHei heading, page number placement, three-line tables, captions, and equations.
review_initial_requirements: agent-rule-extraction: ECNU sample extraction coverage
review_regression_requirements: Coverage does not require live LLM calls and degrades clearly if LibreOffice is unavailable.
refs: 格式集/华东师范大学毕业论文格式要求.doc; backend/tests/test_profile_extractions.py
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions.py -q -> 24 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 62 passed 1 warning; deterministic ECNU extraction coverage confirms A4, margins, indent, line spacing, fonts, abstract length, captions, table/equation rules, and page-number uncertainty

title: Add profile extraction creation API
description: Add POST /api/profile-extractions for document and natural-language extraction jobs. Validate request shape and return job id/status/source metadata.
acceptance_criteria: API creates queued extraction jobs for valid document or natural-language requests and rejects invalid/empty requests clearly.
review_initial_requirements: profile-draft-confirmation: Extraction result retrieval; rule-source-input source creation scenarios
review_regression_requirements: Existing file/job/profile routes keep working.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions_api.py -q -> 2 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 64 passed 1 warning; POST /api/profile-extractions creates natural-language queued extraction jobs and rejects empty sources

title: Add extraction result retrieval API
description: Add GET /api/profile-extractions/{job_id} to return queued/running/completed/failed extraction records including drafts, evidence, uncertain items, and errors when present.
acceptance_criteria: Queued/running jobs return status and no completed draft; completed jobs return draft/evidence/uncertain_items; failed jobs return readable error.
review_initial_requirements: profile-draft-confirmation: Retrieve queued/running/completed/failed extraction result
review_regression_requirements: 404 behavior for missing records is consistent with existing APIs.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions_api.py -q -> 4 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 66 passed 1 warning; GET /api/profile-extractions/{id} returns queued records and 404 for missing jobs

title: Add profile extraction API tests
description: Add API tests for successful creation, completed result retrieval, failed result retrieval, validation errors, and schema failure diagnostics.
acceptance_criteria: Profile extraction API tests cover all new endpoint scenarios and pass with existing backend suite.
review_initial_requirements: profile-draft-confirmation scenarios
review_regression_requirements: Existing API tests still pass.
notes: verification:uv run pytest tests/test_profile_extractions_api.py -q -> 8 passed; uv run pytest -q -> 70 passed 1 warning; API tests cover natural-language/document creation, validation errors, queued/completed/failed retrieval, and missing jobs

title: Add frontend extraction API client types
description: Extend frontend API types and client methods for profile extraction job creation and retrieval.
acceptance_criteria: TypeScript models cover source metadata, profile_draft, uncertain_items, evidence, status, and errors. Client methods call POST/GET profile extraction endpoints.
review_initial_requirements: profile-draft-confirmation: Extraction result retrieval
review_regression_requirements: Existing API client types for files/jobs/profiles remain compatible.
notes: verification:cd frontend && npm run build -> passed; added ProfileExtractionRecord, evidence, uncertain item, status/source types and create/get API client methods

title: Add extraction submission and review panel
description: Add workbench UI for document/natural-language extraction submission, job refresh, draft summary display, uncertain item review, and evidence display.
acceptance_criteria: User can create extraction jobs from uploaded rule documents or natural-language text and inspect completed draft/evidence/uncertain_items. Failures are visible without hiding manual profile controls.
review_initial_requirements: profile-draft-confirmation: Web review and confirmation; Extraction UI failure visibility
review_regression_requirements: Upload, task output, and manual profile editor remain visible and usable.
notes: verification:cd frontend && npm run build -> passed; added extraction panel for natural-language/document submission, result refresh, draft summary, uncertain items, evidence, and error display while preserving manual profile controls

title: Connect extracted drafts to profile save flow
description: Allow users to load an extracted profile draft into the existing structured editor and save it as draft or active only after explicit confirmation.
acceptance_criteria: Extraction completion does not auto-activate a profile. User can edit loaded draft and save through existing profile APIs with selected status.
review_initial_requirements: profile-draft-confirmation: Save reviewed draft; Do not auto-activate unconfirmed draft
review_regression_requirements: Existing YAML import/export and manual draft creation still work.
notes: verification:cd frontend && npm run build -> passed; extracted profile_draft loads into existing editor only after explicit user action, remains draft/imported, and uses existing save flow for draft/active confirmation

title: Run extraction UI build verification
description: Run frontend build after extraction UI changes and record coverage of submission, failure, result review, and manual profile coexistence states.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes and notes document the reviewed UI states.
review_initial_requirements: profile-draft-confirmation frontend scenarios
review_regression_requirements: No TypeScript regressions in existing profile/job UI.
notes: verification:cd frontend && npm run build -> passed; reviewed UI states include natural-language submission, document-source disabled without upload, result refresh, error display, evidence/uncertain lists, load-draft action, and manual profile editor coexistence

title: Update Agent extraction documentation
description: Update root/backend/frontend README and .env.example for Agent extraction configuration, output safety boundaries, manual confirmation, and verification commands.
acceptance_criteria: Docs explain LLM env vars, no direct DOCX writes, evidence/uncertainty requirements, natural-language/document sources, and how to verify extraction.
review_initial_requirements: All Agent extraction safety and API capabilities
review_regression_requirements: Existing document engine docs remain accurate.
notes: StageC:manual-doc-review

title: Run Agent extraction final verification
description: Run OpenSpec validation, backend tests, frontend build, ECNU extraction smoke check, and hardcoded secret scan.
acceptance_criteria: openspec validate add-agent-rule-extraction --strict --no-interactive passes. Backend tests pass. Frontend build passes. ECNU extraction smoke confirms required fields. Secret scan finds no hardcoded keys.
review_initial_requirements: All add-agent-rule-extraction specs
review_regression_requirements: Previous document engine verification remains green.
notes: StageC:final-verification
